user_story: As a Project admin, I want to view the resource management notification templates list, so that I can manage project and resource notifications
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Resource Management Notification Templates screen; When the list loads; Then I see the Notification type, Description and Task columns

user_story: As a Project admin, I want to open and view a specific resource notification template such as Project is closed, so that I can review its content
acceptance_criteria: Given the resource notification templates are listed; When I click View on a row; Then the template content is displayed

user_story: As a Project admin, I want to refresh the resource notification templates list, so that I see the latest configuration
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Resource Management Notification Templates screen; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads

user_story: As a Project admin, I want to switch to the Email Templates view for resource management, so that I can manage emails alongside notifications
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Resource Management Notification Templates screen; When I select the Email Templates tab; Then the email templates are shown
